mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM xeus.crms_trans_avi AS avi
LEFT JOIN xeus.crms_trans_work AS vdwk ON vdwk.avi_mgr_seq = avi.mgr_seq AND vdwk.rqst_mgr_seq = avi.rqst_mgr_seq LEFT JOIN xeus.mt_cmm_cde AS vdwk_work_stat_cd_rel ON vdwk_work_stat_cd_rel.grp_cde = 'C57' AND vdwk_work_stat_cd_rel.cde_cde = vdwk.work_stat_cd LEFT JOIN xeus.asset_cctv AS cctv_no_rel ON cctv_no_rel.mgr_no = avi.cctv_mgr_no LEFT JOIN xeus.mt_cmm_cde AS bak_stat_cd_rel ON bak_stat_cd_rel.grp_cde = 'C62' AND bak_stat_cd_rel.cde_cde = avi.bak_stat_cd
LEFT JOIN xeus.crms_rqst_renew AS renew ON renew.rqst_mgr_seq = vdwk.rqst_mgr_seq AND renew.avi_mgr_seq = vdwk.avi_mgr_seq AND renew.file_seq = vdwk.file_seq
avi.rqst_mgr_seq = #{rqstMgrSeq}::numeric
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM xeus.crms_trans_avi
rqst_mgr_seq = ${rqstMgrSeq}::numeric
AND mgr_seq = ${aviMgrSeq}::numeric
